refined_caption: The hospital food tray contains bread, butter, jam, and a drink, but the presentation appears unappetizing. The food items are not arranged in an appealing manner.
complaint_description: I was disappointed with the food served to me during my stay at the hospital. The food tray had a basic meal of bread, butter, and jam, but it looked unappetizing and lacked any effort in presentation. This made it difficult for me to eat and enjoy my meal.
voice_text: The food they brought me looks really unappetizing, just some plain bread and stuff on a tray.
